title: osascript Apple Notes title dump — May 4 2025 (visual capture)
html:
Screenshot of the same osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get the name of every note' Terminal run already canonized in 2025 05 04 apple notes osascript titles dump — visual proof of the form at scale, with the zshrc error in the prior line.

osascript as export tool · zshrc too many open files · 2025 05 04 apple notes osascript titles dump
